note: These formulas are frozen at ATM-416. Changing a formula after seeing baseline results is an OWNER_GATE.

conversion_rate.description: Fraction of sessions that reach the convert event

aov.description: Average order value in dollars, computed over all convert events with amount_cents

refund_rate.description: Fraction of conversions that result in a refund event

fulfill_rate.description: Fraction of conversions that are fulfilled (not cancelled)

refund_rate.label: refund guardrail
refund_rate.action: STOP if refund_rate > 0.15 in retest — do not issue GO or ITERATE

conversion_rate.label: minimum conversion floor
conversion_rate.action: STOP if conversion_rate < 0.01 — degenerate cohort, do not compare

verdict_rules.GO: retest conversion_rate > baseline AND no guardrail breach
verdict_rules.ITERATE: retest conversion_rate <= baseline but within noise (<5% delta) AND no guardrail breach
verdict_rules.PIVOT: retest conversion_rate < baseline by >5% OR guardrail breached on secondary metric
verdict_rules.STOP: guardrail breached on refund_rate OR conversion_rate < floor
